statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next safe Owner Workflow slice as Anton: a mobile-first Service Prep Planner on [maintenance.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/maintenance.html) for oil, wheel/tire, battery, and filter prep. It uses existing site facts only, adds copy/reset checklist behavior in [maintenance.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/maintenance.js), adds `service prep` search coverage, bumps the service worker to `v272`, and extends [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1) with planner assertions.

Updated durable state in `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`. The next clean slice is recorded: a Maintenance Minder Pocket Planner built only from the existing Honda-sourced A/B and sub-item 1-6 tables, with no mileage prediction and no brake-fluid sub-code.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Targeted Playwright smoke passed for `maintenance.html` and `garage.html`.
- Full `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v272-service-prep -SkipScreenshots` passed.
- `Capture-Screenshots.ps1` failed to write the first image, so I captured direct Playwright screenshots instead:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v272-service-prep-mobile-maintenance.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v272-service-prep-desktop-maintenance.png`
